    <title>Elevated errors on several models</title>
    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>21</var>, <var data-var='time'>18:18</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - From 8:28am PT / 15:28 UTC through 9:26am PT / 16:26 UTC users experienced elevated errors on requests to multiple Claude models. This issue has been resolved. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>21</var>, <var data-var='time'>17:07</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Monitoring</strong> - A fix has been implemented and we are monitoring the results. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>21</var>, <var data-var='time'>15:51</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Identified</strong> - The issue has been identified and a fix is being implemented. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'>21</var>, <var data-var='time'>15:35</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are currently investigating this issue. </p></content>
